content: TDD micro-commit cycle: write failing test commit 'red:', implement commit 'green:'. Config and techdef packages use this in Stage 1.
Squash TDD micro-commits (red:/green:) into conventional atomic commits (feat:, test:) before merge. Lead spawns a dedicated builder-squash agent for this step.
huh form groups: each prompt step maps to a *huh.Group; all groups appended to huh.NewForm() and form.Run() called once. Skip optional prompts by checking field value before appending group.
.gitignore: root the binary name with a leading slash (/doozer-scaffold) to avoid accidentally ignoring directories with the same name as the binary (e.g. cmd/doozer-scaffold/).
Stage 1 fully implemented: techdef, config, templates, scaffold, prompt (huh), CLI main.go, CI/lint config, acceptance tests. All 20 spec acceptance criteria met.
